attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID,
	METRIC_ID,
	HIERARCHY_ID,
	TIME_PERIOD,
	FISCAL_QTR,
	MEASURE_TYPE,
	METRIC_CLASS,
	VALUE_1,
	VALUE_2,
	VALUE_3,
	VALUE_4,
	VALUE_5,
	VALUE_6,
	VALUE_7,
	VALUE_8,
	TARGET_VALUE,
	TOLERANCE,
	VALUE_1_CAL,
	VALUE_2_CAL,
	VALUE_3_CAL,
	VALUE_4_CAL,
	VALUE_5_CAL,
	VALUE_6_CAL,
	VALUE_7_CAL,
	VALUE_8_CAL,
	TARGET_VALUE_CAL,
	TOLERANCE_VALUE_CAL,
	BENCHMARK,
	DIM_1,
	DIM_2,
	DIM_3,
	DIM_4,
	DIM_5,
	SORTORDER,
	LASTUPDATE,
	METRIC_STATUS,
	TREND_UP,
	BATCH_ID,
	VALUE_1_1,
	VALUE_1_2,
	VALUE_1_3,
	VALUE_1_4,
	VALUE_1_5,
	ACTION_PLAN_COMMENTS,
	KEY_DRIVER_COMMENTS,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER,
	 EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
	 EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
FROM
(
	SELECT
		WI.SCORECARD_ID,
		COALESCE(MP.METRIC_ID,-1) AS METRIC_ID,
		COALESCE(MP.HIERARCHY_ID,-1) AS HIERARCHY_ID,
		TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC AS TIME_PERIOD,
		FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QTR,
		NULL AS MEASURE_TYPE,
		'Corporate' AS METRIC_CLASS,
		ACTUAL_AMOUNT_FMT AS VALUE_1,
		PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT AS VALUE_2,
		FORECAST_AMOUNT_FMT AS VALUE_3,
		Y2Y_TREND_VALUE_FMT AS VALUE_4,
		NULL VALUE_5,
		NULL VALUE_6,
		NULL VALUE_7,
		NULL VALUE_8,
		TARGET_AMOUNT_FMT AS TARGET_VALUE,
		NULL AS TOLERANCE,
		ACTUAL_AMOUNT AS VALUE_1_CAL,
		PLAN_AMOUNT AS VALUE_2_CAL,
		FORECAST_AMOUNT AS VALUE_3_CAL,
		Y2Y_TREND_VALUE  VALUE_4_CAL,
		NULL VALUE_5_CAL,
		NULL VALUE_6_CAL,
		NULL VALUE_7_CAL,
		NULL VALUE_8_CAL,
		TARGET_AMOUNT AS TARGET_VALUE_CAL,
		NULL AS TOLERANCE_VALUE_CAL,
		'AUTOMATED' AS BENCHMARK,
		WI.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 AS DIM_1,
		ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 AS DIM_2,
		HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 AS DIM_3,
		HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4 AS DIM_4,
		HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 AS DIM_5,
		NULL SORTORDER,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) LASTUPDATE,
		NULL METRIC_STATUS,
		NULL  TREND_UP,
		NULL BATCH_ID,
		NULL VALUE_1_1,
		NULL VALUE_1_2,
		NULL VALUE_1_3,
		NULL VALUE_1_4,
		NULL VALUE_1_5,
		NULL ACTION_PLAN_COMMENTS,
		NULL KEY_DRIVER_COMMENTS,
		 WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
		 WI.EDW_CREATE_USER,
		 WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		 WI.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
		WI.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
		WI.HIERARCHY_TYPE,
		WI.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
		
	FROM
		$$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_MERGE WI
		LEFT JOIN $$PMMDATADB.APP_EL_METRIC_MEAS_HIER_MAP MP ON
			MP.SCORECARD_ID = WI.SCORECARD_ID
			AND MP.METRIC_CLASS = WI.METRIC_CLASS
			AND MP.MEASURE_NAME = WI.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1
			AND MP.HIERARCHY_TYPE =  WI.HIERARCHY_TYPE
	WHERE WI.HIERARCHY_TYPE <> 'BE' 
			OR (WI.HIERARCHY_TYPE= 'BE'  
				AND WI.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 <> 'SERVICE' )
)T

SELECT
 ACTL.SCORECARD_ID , 
 ACTL.METRIC_ID , 
 'Corporate' AS METRIC_CLASS ,
 ACTL.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
 COALESCE(FCST.AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , COALESCE(TRGT.AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,PLAN.AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC)) AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
  'Quarterly' AS TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
 ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
 ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4 , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 , 
 COALESCE(FCST.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,COALESCE(TRGT.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,PLAN.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2)) AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
 NULL AS ACTUAL_AMOUNT_FMT , 
 PLAN.PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT ,
 FCST.FORECST_AMOUNT_FMT FORECAST_AMOUNT_FMT,
 TRGT.TARGET_AMOUNT_FMT ,
 NULL AS ACTUAL_AMOUNT ,
PLAN.PLAN_AMOUNT ,
 FCST.FORECST_AMOUNT AS FORECAST_AMOUNT               ,
TRGT.TARGET_AMOUNT ,
NULL AS Y2Y_TREND_VALUE,
NULL AS Y2Y_TREND_VALUE_FMT ,
 COALESCE(FCST.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,COALESCE(TRGT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,PLAN.EDW_CREATE_DTM)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 COALESCE(FCST.EDW_CREATE_USER ,COALESCE(TRGT.EDW_CREATE_USER,PLAN.EDW_CREATE_USER)) AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 COALESCE(FCST.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,COALESCE(TRGT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,PLAN.EDW_CREATE_DTM)) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 COALESCE(FCST.EDW_CREATE_USER ,COALESCE(TRGT.EDW_CREATE_USER,PLAN.EDW_CREATE_USER)) AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM
(
 SELECT
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	  HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME, 
	 RFMY.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
	RFMY.FISCAL_QTR_AGE
	FROM
	(

  SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
     HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_ACTL_QTR WHERE MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 in ('PRODUCT BOOKINGS')
	AND HIERARCHY_TYPE in ('GEO','BE','SUB BE','SUMMARY')
	AND AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('ACTUAL')

	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_ACTL_QTR WHERE MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 in ('SERVICE BOOKINGS')
	AND HIERARCHY_TYPE in ('GEO','BE','SUB BE','SUMMARY')
	AND AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('ACTUAL')


	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
    HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_ACTL_QTR WHERE MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 in ('TOTAL BOOKINGS')
	AND HIERARCHY_TYPE in ('GEO','BE','SUB BE','SUMMARY')
	AND AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('ACTUAL')

	UNION 
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_SUBBE
	WHERE  AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('ACTUAL')
	)ACTL1 
	INNER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFMY
	ON 1=1
	WHERE 1=1
	AND RFMY.FISCAL_QTR_AGE BETWEEN -4 AND -1 
/*	AND ACTL1.HIERARCHY_TYPE= 'GEO'
	AND ACTL1.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 = 'Americas'
	AND RFMY.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID = '2013Q2'*/

	)ACTL

	LEFT JOIN 
	(
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS FORECST_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS FORECST_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_TOTL_BKGS_FCST
	UNION 
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS   MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS FORECST_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS FORECST_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_PROD_BKGS_FCST
	UNION 
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME  AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS FORECST_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS FORECST_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_TOTL_MSG_RCRDS
	WHERE AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('FORECAST')
	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS FORECST_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS FORECST_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_SUBBE
	WHERE AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('FORECAST')
	)FCST ON
	     ACTL.SCORECARD_ID = FCST.SCORECARD_ID
		AND ACTL.METRIC_ID = FCST.METRIC_ID
		AND ACTL.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 = FCST.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1
		AND ACTL.HIERARCHY_TYPE = FCST.HIERARCHY_TYPE
		AND ACTL.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 = FCST.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2
		AND ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 = FCST.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3
		AND COALESCE(ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,'=') = COALESCE(FCST.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,'=')
		AND COALESCE(ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,'=') = COALESCE(FCST.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,'=')
		AND ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID =  FCST.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
LEFT JOIN 
	(
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2, 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS TARGET_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS TARGET_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_PROD_BKGS_TRGT
	
	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2, 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS TARGET_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS TARGET_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_TOTL_MSG_RCRDS
	WHERE AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC = 'TARGET'
	
	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS TARGET_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS TARGET_AMOUNT  ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_SUBBE 
	WHERE AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC = 'TARGET'
	)TRGT ON 
		ACTL.SCORECARD_ID = TRGT.SCORECARD_ID
		AND ACTL.METRIC_ID = TRGT.METRIC_ID
		AND ACTL.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 = TRGT.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1
		AND ACTL.HIERARCHY_TYPE = TRGT.HIERARCHY_TYPE
		AND ACTL.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 = TRGT.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2
		AND ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 = TRGT.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3
		AND COALESCE(ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,'=') = COALESCE(TRGT.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,'=')
		AND COALESCE(ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,'=') = COALESCE(TRGT.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,'=')
		AND ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID = TRGT.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
	LEFT JOIN	
	(
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2, 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS PLAN_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_TOTL_BKGS_PLAN
	
	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2, 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS PLAN_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_PROD_BKGS_PLAN
	
	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2, 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS PLAN_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_SRVC_BKGS_PLAN
	
	UNION
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT AS PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS PLAN_AMOUNT  ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_SUBBE 
	WHERE AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('PLAN')
	)PLAN ON 
		ACTL.SCORECARD_ID = PLAN.SCORECARD_ID
		AND ACTL.METRIC_ID = PLAN.METRIC_ID
		AND ACTL.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 = PLAN.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1
		AND ACTL.HIERARCHY_TYPE = PLAN.HIERARCHY_TYPE
		AND ACTL.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 = PLAN.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2
		AND ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 = PLAN.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3
		AND COALESCE(ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,'=') = COALESCE(PLAN.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,'=')
		AND COALESCE(ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,'=') = COALESCE(PLAN.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,'=')
		AND ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID = PLAN.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
WHERE 1=1
AND (	FCST.FORECST_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL
			OR TRGT.TARGET_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL
			OR PLAN.PLAN_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL)

SELECT
 ACTL.SCORECARD_ID , 
 ACTL.METRIC_ID , 
 'Corporate' AS METRIC_CLASS ,
 ACTL.MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
 ACTL.AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
 CASE WHEN ACTL.TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC  = 'QUARTERLY' THEN 'Quarterly' ELSE ACTL.TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC END AS  TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
 ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
 ACTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4 , 
 ACTL.HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5 , 
 ACTL.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 , 
 ACTL.ACTUAL_AMOUNT_FMT , 
 PLAN.PLAN_AMOUNT_FMT ,
 FCST.FORECST_AMOUNT_FMT FORECAST_AMOUNT_FMT,
 TRGT.TARGET_AMOUNT_FMT ,
 ACTL.ACTUAL_AMOUNT ,
 PLAN.PLAN_AMOUNT ,
 FCST.FORECST_AMOUNT AS FORECAST_AMOUNT,
 TRGT.TARGET_AMOUNT ,
 Y2Y.Y2Y_TREND_VALUE,
 Y2Y.Y2Y_TREND_VALUE_FMT ,
 ACTL.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
 ACTL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 ACTL.EDW_CREATE_DTM  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 ACTL.EDW_CREATE_USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 FROM
	(
	SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME_DIM1, 
	 HIERARCHY_TYPE , 
	 AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC , 
	 TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME , 
	 FISCAL_QUARTER_ID , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , 
	 HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	  HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	 ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	 CAST(AMOUNT_VALUE AS VARCHAR(64)) AS ACTUAL_AMOUNT_FMT , 
	 AMOUNT_VALUE AS ACTUAL_AMOUNT ,
	 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
	 EDW_CREATE_USER 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_ACTL_QTR
	WHERE AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('ACTUAL')
	UNION ALL 
	/*SELECT 
	 SCORECARD_ID , 
	 METRIC_ID , 
	 MEASURE_NAME  AS  MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
